hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *"firestore.rules"* ]]; then echo '⚠️  firestore.rules changed — run: npm run deploy:rules'; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *"MODEL_ROUTER.md"* ]]; then echo '⚠️  MODEL_ROUTER.md changed — verify task→model assignments match in src/services/aiService.ts and src/services/jobMatchingEngine.ts'; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *"/api/"* && "$FILE" == *".ts"* ]]; then echo 'ℹ️  API file changed — remember to test via: curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/<endpoint>'; fi
